'''Thrago''' was a small [[Moon/Legends|moon]] located in the [[Thrago system/Legends|Thrago system]] of the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] with a swirling [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of yellow sulfuric clouds. It was little more than a hubba-shaped lump of rock, barely ten [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] from end to end and so blanketed in dust that its thousands of craters had a soft, almost featureless look from orbit. It was the location of [[Supply Depot Thrago]], belonging to the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]]. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] tricked a number of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knights]], including [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], [[Zekk]], [[Tahiri Veila]], [[Tesar Sebatyne]] and [[Lowbacca]], into believing the Chiss were planning a preemptive strike on the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]]. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] used [[StealthX]]s to help Jacen [[Raid on Supply Depot Thrago|attack]] Thrago, provoking the Chiss to attack the Killiks, as Jacen intended.
